description:
You are a computer science researcher compiling a bibliography. Use DBLP (dblp.org) to find the authoritative peer-reviewed citations for the following papers, ensuring you locate the Conference or Journal versions rather than ArXiv (CoRR) preprints:

1. 'Attention is All You Need' (Vaswani et al.) - NeurIPS version
2. 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He et al.) - CVPR version
3. 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding' (Devlin et al.) - NAACL version
4. 'Dropout: A Simple Way to Prevent Neural Networks from Overfitting' (Srivastava et al.) - JMLR version
5. 'Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization' (Kingma & Ba) - ICLR version

Save the BibTeX citations for all five entries into a single file at ~/Documents/deep_learning.bib. Additionally, create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Bibliography Sources' containing the DBLP page for each of these five papers.
